name: Patient A
history: Brother died by suicide when the patient was young. Ongoing family conflict about discussing the loss. Parents initially did not allow the patient to seek talk therapy after the death.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must keep my emotions to myself to avoid conflict.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change the past, so there's no point in trying to feel better.
coping_strategies: Avoid discussing emotions and focus on taking care of others.
situation: Realizing that the brother's birthday is approaching.
auto_thought: I can't handle this; it's too overwhelming.
behavior: Withdraw from social interactions and avoid talking about the brother.
